extra.reason: Estrutura de pastas src/{main/{infrastructure,ipc},preload,renderer,domain,application}, tests/{domain,application,infrastructure,e2e}, scripts, docs criada com .gitkeep
Estrutura de pastas com .gitkeep já criada no disco (PRD §24)
Estrutura de pastas com .gitkeep criada no disco (PRD §24)
tsconfig strict por camada (project refs) + package.json/Vite/esbuild/ESLint/Prettier/.editorconfig/.gitignore/electron-builder.yml; typecheck, lint, vitest e prettier verdes
tsconfig strict por camada (project refs) + package.json/Vite/esbuild/ESLint/Prettier/.editorconfig/.gitignore/electron-builder.yml; typecheck, lint, vitest e prettier verdes
Docs base criadas: ARCHITECTURE.md, CONTRIBUTING.md, WINDOWS_AUTH_SETUP.md
Todos os 4 filhos concluídos: estrutura de pastas, tsconfig strict por camada, configs base (package.json/Vite/esbuild/ESLint/Prettier/electron-builder) e docs
Foundation completa: estrutura, tsconfig strict, configs base, docs
Container de DI leve, dependency-free, com value/factory/class providers, lifecycles singleton/transient, Fail Fast (token ausente, duplicado, circular). 9 testes verdes.

Layout userData (PRD §4) via createAppPaths/ensureAppDirectories; Logger (SinkLogger) com redação de segredos (PRD §18) + adapter electron-log; ConfigStore (InMemory + adapter electron-store) com AppSettings/DEFAULT_SETTINGS. 16 testes.

Camada IPC tipada: contrato único em src/shared (IpcChannelMap, RecrdApi, createRecrdApi), IpcRegistry com Fail Fast (canal ausente/duplicado), bind electron ipcMain testável, preload contextBridge expõe window.recrd. Nova camada shared para contratos entre processos. 36 testes.

Bootstrap Electron: main.ts compõe serviços (paths/logger/config/appInfo) via DI, registra IPC tipado em ipcMain, abre BrowserWindow segura (contextIsolation, nodeIntegration=false, sandbox, webSecurity). Preload contextBridge. Renderer React (index.html/main.tsx/App) consome window.recrd. compose.ts testável (DI+registry). Build completo (tsc+esbuild ESM main/CJS preload+vite) verde.
Arquitetura base completa: DI container, logging/config/userData, IPC tipado, bootstrap Electron seguro. App compila e empacota fim-a-fim (tsc+esbuild+vite); 38 testes unitários verdes.

@testing-library/react + jest-dom configurados: tests/setup.ts (matchers + cleanup), vitest setupFiles, esbuild jsx automatic, env jsdom por docblock. Teste de componente App (bridge ausente + bridge mockado) verde. Aliases @renderer/@shared em vitest e tsconfig.tests.

Metadados de build reprodutível: createVersionInfo (shared, lido pela tela Sobre) gera version/gitCommit/buildDate/target; formatSha256Sums + formatChangelog (puros, testados); writeVersionJson/writeSha256Sums/writeChangelog (I/O testado com temp dir). 8 testes.

Scripts npm via tsx: test (typecheck+vitest), build (typecheck+lint+vite+esbuild+testes), release (clean+npm ci+testes+build+electron-builder+version.json/SHA256/CHANGELOG, RECRD_SKIP_PACKAGE p/ Linux), dev (esbuild watch+vite server+electron). build-meta (git/package) testado. 48 testes.

Gate de cobertura v8 100% (lines/branches/functions/statements) sobre camadas unit-testáveis (domain/application/shared/main di,app,infra,ipc + release-format/artifacts); entrypoints/adapters Electron e barrels excluídos. npm run build roda test:coverage. 53 testes, 100%.

Workflows GitHub Actions: ci.yml (push/PR: npm ci, lint, typecheck, test:coverage gate 100%, build Vite+esbuild, upload coverage) e release.yml (tags v*/manual: npm run release no Windows, electron-builder NSIS+portable x64, smoke de artefatos, upload version.json/SHA256/CHANGELOG/exe). YAML validado.

Workflows GitHub Actions: ci.yml (push/PR: npm ci, lint, typecheck, test:coverage gate 100%, build Vite+esbuild, upload coverage) e release.yml (tags v*/manual: npm run release no Windows, electron-builder NSIS+portable x64, smoke de artefatos, upload version.json/SHA256/CHANGELOG/exe). YAML validado.
CI/CD completo: scripts locais (test/build/release/dev), metadados de build reprodutível, gate de cobertura 100%, workflows GitHub Actions (CI + release Windows). Desbloqueia as epics de features.

Utilitário SQLite temporário por teste de integração (PRD §23): createTempDatabase (arquivo temp ou :memory:) com pragmas WAL/foreign_keys e cleanup; withTempDatabase garante limpeza mesmo em erro. 5 testes com better-sqlite3 real.

Playwright E2E com driver Electron (PRD §23): playwright.config.ts (testDir tests/e2e, *.e2e.ts, workers 1, retries CI), smoke app.e2e.ts (launch Electron, valida shell renderizado), pretest:e2e builda renderer+main. Job e2e no CI roda sob xvfb. --list valida o teste.
Infra de testes completa: Vitest + @testing-library/react (jsdom), utilitário SQLite temporário (better-sqlite3), Playwright E2E (driver Electron) com job CI sob xvfb. Desbloqueia epics de features.

UserContext (domain port) + MockUserContext (Linux dev) + WindowsUserContext (os.userInfo + whoami /user /fqdn) + parseSidFromWhoami (puro, testado) + factory por plataforma; registrado no DI (UserContextToken) e logado no bootstrap. 4 testes, 100% cobertura (glue de plataforma excluído).

UserContext (domain port) + MockUserContext (Linux dev) + WindowsUserContext (os.userInfo + whoami /user /fqdn) + parseSidFromWhoami (puro, testado) + factory por plataforma; registrado no DI (UserContextToken) e logado no bootstrap. 4 testes, 100% cobertura (glue de plataforma excluído).

UserContext (domain port) + MockUserContext (Linux dev) + WindowsUserContext (os.userInfo + whoami /user /fqdn) + parseSidFromWhoami (puro, testado) + factory por plataforma; registrado no DI (UserContextToken) e logado no bootstrap. 4 testes, 100% cobertura (glue de plataforma excluído).

Seletores inteligentes (PRD §11): generateSelectors/bestSelector com prioridade data-testid>aria-label>id>name>role>texto>CSS>XPath relativo; nunca XPath absoluto; #id simples vs [id]; escape de aspas. unstableSelectorWarning detecta CSS posicional (nth-child) e alerta. 12 testes, 100%.

Seletores inteligentes (PRD §11): generateSelectors/bestSelector com prioridade data-testid>aria-label>id>name>role>texto>CSS>XPath relativo; nunca XPath absoluto; #id simples vs [id]; escape de aspas. unstableSelectorWarning detecta CSS posicional (nth-child) e alerta. 12 testes, 100%.
Epic Seletores inteligentes completa: gerador por prioridade + alerta de instabilidade, domínio puro 100% coberto.

Pipeline de compilação Robot (PRD §13): modelo ManualScript/ScriptAction; validateScript (erros agregados por ação); generateRobot (Browser library, {{var}}->${var}); optimizeScript (dedup consecutivos, colapsa navegações); validateRobotSyntax (estrutura). 14 testes, domínio 100%.

Pipeline de compilação Robot (PRD §13): modelo ManualScript/ScriptAction; validateScript (erros agregados por ação); generateRobot (Browser library, {{var}}->${var}); optimizeScript (dedup consecutivos, colapsa navegações); validateRobotSyntax (estrutura). 14 testes, domínio 100%.

Pipeline de compilação Robot (PRD §13): modelo ManualScript/ScriptAction; validateScript (erros agregados por ação); generateRobot (Browser library, {{var}}->${var}); optimizeScript (dedup consecutivos, colapsa navegações); validateRobotSyntax (estrutura). 14 testes, domínio 100%.

Epic Pipeline de compilação Robot completa: validação de ações, geração Robot+Playwright, otimização e validação sintática. Domínio puro 100% coberto. (Export do .robot é tratado pela epic de Exportações.)

Parser/validador de CSV de massa (PRD §7): parseMassCsv (header=variáveis, linhas=valores, trim, ignora linhas vazias/CRLF, múltiplas linhas), valida vazio/colunas em branco/duplicadas/contagem de células por linha; toVariableMap mapeia variável->valor do primeiro registro. 9 testes, domínio 100%.

Exportações (PRD §17): domínio puro (slugify, recrdJsonFileName/robotFileName/executionLogFileName, serializeManualScript); use cases na application (exportManualScriptJson/exportCompiledRobot/exportExecutionLog) via porta ExportEnvironment injetável; createExportEnvironment (Node fs) na infra grava em userData/exports. 11 testes, 100%.

Exportações (PRD §17): domínio puro (slugify, recrdJsonFileName/robotFileName/executionLogFileName, serializeManualScript); use cases na application (exportManualScriptJson/exportCompiledRobot/exportExecutionLog) via porta ExportEnvironment injetável; createExportEnvironment (Node fs) na infra grava em userData/exports. 11 testes, 100%.
Epic Exportações completa: JSON bruto (.recrd.json), Robot compilado (.robot) e logs de execução (execution-*.log) com nomes derivados e gravação no diretório exports.

Auditoria (PRD §16,§18): createAuditFields/touchAuditFields (CreatedBy/At/UpdatedBy/At, domínio puro determinístico); recordAuditEvent + AuditSink (application) para eventos import/change/compile/export/execution; LoggerAuditSink (infra) redige segredos via SinkLogger (nunca loga senhas). 5 testes, 100%.

Auditoria (PRD §16,§18): createAuditFields/touchAuditFields (CreatedBy/At/UpdatedBy/At, domínio puro determinístico); recordAuditEvent + AuditSink (application) para eventos import/change/compile/export/execution; LoggerAuditSink (infra) redige segredos via SinkLogger (nunca loga senhas). 5 testes, 100%.
Epic Auditoria & logging estruturado completa: campos de auditoria em todos os objetos + registro de eventos auditáveis com redação de segredos.

Git read-only (PRD §14): parseGitStatus (puro) extrai branch e classifica mudanças (modified/added/deleted/renamed/untracked) de git status --porcelain=v1 --branch; GitService (runner injetável) com getStatus/isRepository, testado com fake + git real do repo. 5 testes, 100%.
Epic Integração Git (read-only) completa: branch atual + arquivos alterados via git CLI, somente leitura.

Implemented pressKey action end-to-end (IR, capture, validation, Robot generation) with TDD; 168 tests pass at 100% coverage
probe

Tema base implementado: src/renderer/styles/theme.css (tokens preto/branco/cinza, tipografia, espacamento, bordas, foco, elevacao) + reset.css (reset global, focus-visible ring, scrollbars, prefers-reduced-motion). Importados em main.tsx; renderer build OK.

Biblioteca de UI base em src/renderer/components/ui/: Button, IconButton, Input, Select, Panel, Toolbar, List, Tree, Tabs, Modal (focus trap+escape), Toast/ToastRegion+useToasts, Spinner + helper cx. Acessiveis (ARIA roles/labels, focus-visible) e testadas: 23 testes @testing-library passando. Estilos em ui.css usando tokens do tema. typecheck/lint/193 testes verdes.

Contrato IPC refatorado para composicao por feature: src/shared/ipc/core.ts (primitivos genericos ChannelDef/ChannelMap/Invoke/RequestOf/ResponseOf + defineChannelNames type-safe), src/shared/ipc/app.ts (feature app: DTO/AppChannels/APP_CHANNELS/AppApi/createAppApi seguindo convencao recurso:acao), barrel src/shared/ipc/index.ts. ipc-contract.ts agora agrega via interseccao (IpcChannelMap, IPC_CHANNELS, RecrdApi compostos das features) e createRecrdApi compoe os factories por feature. Backward-compatible. typecheck/lint/195 testes verdes; shared 100% coverage.

Infraestrutura registrada no container DI. Novos tokens (DatabaseToken, RepositoriesToken, GitServiceFactoryToken, ToolRunnerToken, RobotProjectServiceToken, RobotRunnerToken, SandboxViewFactoryToken) em di/tokens.ts. compose.ts ganhou registerInfrastructure(container, {database, sandboxViewFactory}): DB handle + repositories (factory lazy), GitService factory por cwd, nodeToolRunner, RobotProjectService, RobotRunner (singleton lazy), sandbox factory. main.ts abre DB no bootstrap (createDatabase(paths.database), roda migrations) e fecha em will-quit. Novos tipos GitServiceFactory/createGitService, RobotProjectService/createRobotProjectService, SandboxViewFactory (sandbox-config, electron-free). typecheck/lint/196 testes/cobertura 100% verdes; main empacota OK.

App.tsx refatorado em shell: sidebar de navegacao primaria (Inicio/Automacao/Massas com aria-current), area principal por View com roteamento tipado (renderView), e status bar com app info do bridge. Substituiu navegacao placeholder. styles/app-shell.css com tokens do tema. 5 testes App + build renderer OK; typecheck/lint/197 testes verdes.

Use cases CRUD de Project com auditoria (TDD). createProjectUseCases (application/project/project-service.ts): create (stamp createdBy/At via UserContext), list, open, rename, updateDetails (description/robotPath), remove. Orquestra ports injetados (ProjectRepository, UserContext, IdGenerator, Clock) — camada platform-agnostic, auditoria deterministica via domain audit helpers. 13 testes unitarios cobrindo todos os caminhos. Wired no composition root via registerUseCases (ProjectUseCasesToken) sobre o CrudRepository SQLite (compat estrutural verificada em compile). typecheck/lint/211 testes/cobertura 100% verdes.

Use cases CRUD de Plan/Suite/Case com auditoria e integridade hierarquica (TDD). createPlan/Suite/CaseUseCases em application/hierarchy/hierarchy-service.ts: create/listByParent/open/rename/remove + updateDescription (Plan/Case) e setStatus (Case). Helper generico application/crud/audited-crud.ts (openOrThrow/auditedUpdate/removeOrThrow/requireParentExists/requireText, EntityRepository<E>). Integridade: filho so criado sob pai existente; auditoria deterministica via UserContext+clock; cascata de delete pelo schema (ON DELETE CASCADE). 12 testes unitarios cobrindo todos os caminhos. typecheck/lint/223 testes/cobertura 100%. Wiring DI/IPC fica para 0uj.3.

compileScript (application/compile/compile-pipeline.ts) orquestra o pipeline: validateScript -> analise de estabilidade de seletores (warnings nao-bloqueantes p/ CSS posicional e XPath absoluto via isStableCss/isAbsoluteXpath) -> optimizeScript -> generateRobot -> validateRobotSyntax. Retorna CompileResult discriminado (ok com robot+warnings | failure com stage script/robot + erros agregados). 5 testes TDD cobrindo sucesso, otimizacao, falha de script, falha de robot e warnings. typecheck/lint/cobertura 100%. Persistencia/escrita .robot fica para l8h.2.

Use case importar CSV (application/mass/mass-service.ts createMassUseCases.importCsv): parseMassCsv -> massFromCsv (com entrada inicial de historico) -> stamp auditoria -> persiste sob Project (parent guard). Erros de CSV retornados como result; parent/nome ausentes lancam (precondicao). Coluna history JSON adicionada a masses (default '[]', mantem db.test verde) + adapter infra createMassRepository que (de)serializa columns/rows/history. 4 testes app + 1 round-trip infra. typecheck/lint/cobertura 100%.
Use case + IPC handler + DI wiring + tests for Robot project scaffolding; handler registration wired in buildIpcRegistry
IPC channels + bridge API + handlers for Project and Plan/Suite/Case, DI wiring for hierarchy use cases (parent-existence checks), tests for handlers and registry

asg.2: list/rename/editValue mass use cases over extended repository port + adapter, audited, with tests. asg.3: mass:* IPC channels + bridge API + handlers (import/list/rename/editValue/selectCsv), native CSV file dialog port (Electron impl injected at compose root), DI wiring, tests.

asg.2: list/rename/editValue mass use cases over extended repository port + adapter, audited, with tests. asg.3: mass:* IPC channels + bridge API + handlers (import/list/rename/editValue/selectCsv), native CSV file dialog port (Electron impl injected at compose root), DI wiring, tests.

compile:run IPC channel + bridge API + handler; compile-and-persist use case (runs pure pipeline, persists scripts.kind=compiled, writes .robot to <robotPath>/tests/); compiled-script repo adapter + Node robot-file-writer infra; DI wiring; use case + handler tests

bindIpcMain now wraps every dispatch: handler failures are logged (channel + request redacted by the structured logger + error name/message/stack) and re-thrown as a serialisable IpcHandlerError carrying a friendly message + channel. New ipc-error module (IpcHandlerError, friendlyMessage, toIpcHandlerError) + tests for the error path and redaction.

Renderer state module: getBridge/useBridge typed bridge access with null fallback outside Electron; useIpcQuery/useIpcAction hooks centralizing IPC calls with loading/error/data; ActiveProjectProvider/useActiveProject context for active-project selection. Wired provider into main.tsx and refactored App useAppInfo onto the new hooks. RTL tests cover all of it.

Novo Projeto wired: NewProjectForm gains description + pending/error feedback; NewProjectScreen container persists via project:create, and for 'novo repo' picks a folder (new dialog:selectDirectory channel + directory-dialog infra) and scaffolds via robot:scaffold, linking robotPath; sets the new project active and navigates home. Full DI/contract wiring + RTL/handler tests.

version.json generated at build (scripts/build-version.ts + write-version lib, wired into build pipeline); read at startup by version-reader with dev fallback; exposed via new app:getVersionInfo channel; About (Sobre) screen displays version/commit/build-date/target via the bridge, added to app nav. Full DI wiring + tests (reader, handler, screen, json content).

Settings feature: AppSettings extended with toolPaths (python/robot) + recording prefs; settings:getAll/update IPC channels + bridge API; handler over the injected ConfigStore (partial patch, only provided keys written); SettingsScreen loads + edits tool paths, screenshot capture and default timeout, with save feedback; added to app nav. Full contract/DI wiring + handler/screen tests; 100% coverage.

Read-only Git panel: git:status (branch + changed files via project-scoped GitService, non-repo returns empty) and git:openExternal (ExternalOpener Electron shell port) channels + bridge API; GitPanel screen reads the active project's robotPath, lists changes, and opens the repo externally; nav entry. Full DI/contract wiring + handler/screen tests; 100% coverage.

Implemented: MassWorkspace wires the mass screen to real IPC (list/import/rename/edit/history); audit trail persists events (mass.import, compile, test.change) with redaction and a read-only Auditoria screen. 100% coverage maintained.

Implemented: MassWorkspace wires the mass screen to real IPC (list/import/rename/edit/history); audit trail persists events (mass.import, compile, test.change) with redaction and a read-only Auditoria screen. 100% coverage maintained.

Implemented ProjectExplorer: eager-loads the Project>Plan>Suite>Case forest over hierarchy IPC, wires selection to global active-project state, and provides context actions (create child, rename, delete) at each level. Added a Projetos nav destination. 8 component tests.

Implemented linkExisting use case: validates a chosen folder against the Robot layout (inspector) and links robotPath on success, returning missing paths on failure. robot:linkExisting IPC + handler; New Project 'existing repo' path now picks a folder and links/validates it. 100% coverage.

Implemented execution:listRecent (use case reads the executions table newest-first, resolves case names) + HomeView container binding HomeScreen to real recent-execution data and functional quick actions (Abrir Último Projeto opens the latest project). 100% coverage.

Verificacao de ambiente entregue: env:check (checkEnvironment + installPlan via tool runner injetado + venv probe) e EnvironmentScreen com status e plano. Instalacao 1-clique com streaming movida para electron-4kx. 100% coverage.

Implemented event/streaming IPC primitive (typed event contract, settable webContents emitter, preload recrdEvents subscribe, renderer useIpcEvent hook) + env:install: recomputes the plan in main (never trusts renderer commands), runs it via a spawn-backed streaming runner, and streams progress to EnvironmentScreen's live log with a 1-click Instalar button. 100% coverage on the testable core.

RobotRunner wired over IPC: run:start/run:stop invoke handlers drive the DI-registered RobotRunner (resolves the project's Robot path), forwarding stdout line-by-line to the renderer via run:line/run:exit push events (built on the new event-IPC primitive). AutomationView wires Play/Stop/Pause(=Stop) with a live execution log. 100% coverage on the testable core.
Real-time execution log panel delivered in AutomationView: streams run stdout live via run:line events during execution and shows the final result (Aprovado/Falhou by exit code) on run:exit.

On run completion (when scoped to a case), the run handler accumulates stdout and records an audited Execution via execution-service.record: maps exit code to result, computes duration, persists the row, and writes the full log to logs/executions/<id>.log. A selected case in the Project Explorer becomes the run target (active-case state); recorded executions surface on Home. 100% coverage on the testable core.
Wired export use cases (JSON/robot/logs) end-to-end: app use case, IPC contract/handler, infra adapters, DI wiring, 100% coverage
execution:listByCase backend + CaseExecutionHistory widget in Automation sidebar; Home recent widget already present. 100% coverage.
Export UI wired: case JSON+Robot via toolbar, per-execution log export in history sidebar
SandboxController + sandbox:* IPC + Electron view port adapter + main.ts attach. 100% coverage on testable layers.
Sandbox nav: URL bar + back/forward/reload via sandbox:* IPC and SandboxNavBar component
§9 layout (header toolbar+navbar, named sidebar panels, sandbox area) + useResizeRect bounds coordination wired to setSandboxBounds/setSandboxVisible
PropertiesPanel (active project/case) + TogglesPanel (recording prefs via settings) wired into Automation sidebar
Sandbox content-script: DOM listeners -> capture domain -> capture:action event -> main relay; testable dom-descriptor helper; preload bundled in build/dev
Manual-script persistence (ScriptUseCases + store + script:* IPC) and renderer useRecordingSession consuming capture:action with incremental save
Compile UI: Compilar compiles recorded actions, shows progress/validation errors/warnings and .robot preview via CompileResultView
Editable Timeline: list/edit/reorder/remove recorded actions with persistence via useRecordingSession mutators + TimelinePanel
Recording lifecycle: RecordingControls + state machine gating useRecordingSession active (start/pause/resume/stop)
Toolbar fully wired across prior features: Play/Reload→run, Pause/Stop→stop run, Export→export:*, Compile→compile:run; recording lifecycle via RecordingControls. No NOOPs remain in AutomationView.
Capture computes ranked selector candidates (generateSelectors), shipped via capture:action; Timeline warns on low-confidence pick and offers alternatives
MassesPanel lists project masses + draggable column chips with {{variable}} dataTransfer payload
Implemented Inspect mode (hover overlay + toggle) end-to-end and the Element Inspector panel showing tag/id/classes/xpath/suggested+alternative selectors with confidence.
Implemented Inspect mode (hover overlay + toggle) end-to-end and the Element Inspector panel showing tag/id/classes/xpath/suggested+alternative selectors with confidence.
Sandbox content-script now handles dragover/drop of a mass-column chip onto a field, recording an input action with the {{variable}} reference (via massVariableReference) instead of a literal.

Boundary mapping already implemented per-feature: db adapters map Drizzle rows <-> domain (mass-repository JSON columns/rows/history; script-service JSON content; audit fields kept as ISO strings) and the wire DTOs mirror the application/domain types (serialise directly, no Drizzle/Node leak). Added tests/shared/boundary-serialisation.test.ts to pin DTO<->stored structural equivalence and full JSON round-trip serialisability.

Extended tests/e2e/app.e2e.ts with critical drivable flows: launch+shell, sidebar navigation, recording lifecycle (start/pause/resume/stop), Inspect-mode toggle, and settings persistence across an IPC round-trip. Verified 5/5 green by rebuilding better-sqlite3 for Electron ABI and running Playwright from PowerShell (Node ABI restored after). Dialog/Robot-dependent flows (create project, import mass, execute) deferred to a stubbed harness; ABI workflow tracked in electron-9ac.

Filled CLAUDE.md Build & Test / Architecture Overview / Conventions & Patterns from the real implementation (incl. the E2E native-ABI rebuild workflow and 100% coverage policy), and added the same E2E/ABI note to docs/CONTRIBUTING.md. docs/ARCHITECTURE.md already accurate.
